urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Iss Aalam E Ghurbat Me Tumhe Jaane Doon Kaise
Iss Dahste Musibat Me Tumhe Jaane Doon Kaise
english translation text:
In This State Of Loneliness, How Do I Let You Go?
In This Land Of Calamities, How Do I Let You Go?

urdu transliteration text:
Iss Waqt E Qiyamat Me Tumhe Jaane Doon Kaise
Ay Laal Jo Tum Isne Viga Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
In A Time Of Pure Devastation, How Do I Let You Go?
Oh My Beloved Child, Are You Really Asking Me For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr?

urdu transliteration text: Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text: You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Kyaa Guzregi Iss Baap Ke Dil Par Nahin Socha
Tu Ne Ye Meri Jaan Ali Akbar Nahin Socha
english translation text:
Before You Asked, Did You Not Consider What Will Happen To Your Father’s Heart?
Oh My Beloved Son, Ali Akbar, Did You Not Think Of This?

urdu transliteration text:
Mar Jaaoon Ga Me Tuj Se Bichar Kar Nahin Socha
Tum Muj Se Zaifi Ka Asaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
That I Will Pass Away If I Am Separated From You?
You Are Asking For My Support for My Old Age!

urdu transliteration text: Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text: You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Dil Rota Hai Nazron Se Agar Dur Ho Beta
Kis Tarha Judayi Teri Manzur Ho Beta
english translation text:
The Heart Cries When You Are Far From My Sight, Oh My Son
So How Can I Accept The Separation From You, Oh My Son?

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Hi Meri Aankhen Ho Mera Noor Ho Beta
Mujse Meri Aankhon Ki Ziyaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
When You Are My Eyes And The Light With Which I See, Oh My Soon
You Are Now Asking Me For The Light Of My Eyes

urdu transliteration text: Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text: You are asking your father for permission to let you become a martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Duniya Se Gayaa Jis Ghari Mehboob Khuda Ka
Nana Ki Ziyarat Ko Tarap Ta Thaa Nawasaa
english translation text:
At The Time When The Beloved Of Allah SWT (The Prophet SAW) Left This World
I, His Grandson (Imam Hussain AS) Would Yearn To See Him Again.

urdu transliteration text:
Ay Laal Tuje Iss Liye Khaaliq Se Thaa Maanga
Maqbool Huwi Meri Dua Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh My Beloved Son, This Is Why I Asked Allah SWT For A Son Like You (Who Resembles The Prophet SAW)
And Now You Are Asking For The Answer Of My Dua To Be Taken Away!

urdu transliteration text: Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text: You are asking your father for permission to let you become a martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Islam Pe Khud Apna Lahoo Muh Pe Bahaa Wo
Sine Pe Sinaa Shaan Se Medaan Me Khaawo
english translation text:
Do You Wish For Your Blood To Be Shed In This Battlefield For The Sake Of Islam?
Do You Wish To Take The Spears On Your Chest With Utmost Grace In This Battlefield?

urdu transliteration text:
Tasweer Payambar Ki Tan-e-khaaq Milawo
Kyaa Iss Liye Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
The Image Of The Prophet SAW Will Then Fall To The Ground!
Is This The Reason You Are Asking For My Permission To Become A Martyr?

urdu transliteration text: Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text: You are asking your father for permission to let you become a martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Ek Roz Tuje Aan Ke Maangaa Thaa Phupi Ne
Athara Baras Naazon Se Paalaa Thaa Phupi Ne
english translation text:
One Day Your Aunt Came And Asked For You
For 18 Years Your Aunt Has Lovingly Raised You

urdu transliteration text:
Beton Se Bhi Ziyada Tumhe Chahaata Phupi Ne
Ehsan Jo Zainab Ne Kiyaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
She Nurtured You More Than Her Own Sons
You Are Asking For The Sacrifices That Zainab (SA) Has Made For You To Be Nullified

urdu transliteration text: Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text: You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Rakh The Nahin Tum Iski Khabar Ay Mere Pyaare
Kis Darjaa Mohabat Hai Teri Dil Me Hamaare
english translation text:
Oh My Dear One, You Have No Idea Of
Just How Much I Have Loved You As A Son From The Bottom Of My Heart

urdu transliteration text:
Nana Ki Mere Shakl Hai Paykar Me Tumhare
Tum Suraat E Mehboob E Khuda Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
You Are An Embodiment Of My Maternal Grandfather!
You Are Asking Me For Permission To Take The Face Of The Prophet SAW Away From Me!

urdu transliteration text: Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text: You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Sar Tera Bhi Jis Waqt Charhe Ga Sar-e-neza
Hoga Sar E Medaan Judaa Sar Bhi Tumhaara
english translation text:
At The Time When Your Head Will Be Raised On The Head Of A Spear
For Even Your Head Shall Be Severed In The Battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Hamshakl Payambar Ka Gala Kaatenge Aadaa
Goya Mere Nana Ka Gala Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
The Neck Of The Lookalike Of The Prophet SAW Will Be Cut By The Enemies
It’s As If You Are Asking Me To Sacrifice The Neck Of My Maternal Grandfather

urdu transliteration text: Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text: You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar Tumhe Maloom Hai Kyaa Maang Rahe Ho
Tum Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Rahe Ho
english translation text:
Oh Akbar, Do You Realise What You’re Asking Me For?
You Are Asking Your Father For Permission To Let You Become A Martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Akaa Mujhe Maaloom Hai Kyaa Maang Raha Hoon
Ek Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Raha Hoon
english translation text:
Ali Akbar Addresses His Father: Oh Father I Know What I Am Asking For
I Am Asking For The Permission To Be Martyred From A Father!

urdu transliteration text:
Baba Mujhe Amma Ne Bhi Kuch Dars Diya Hai
Aadab E Wafaa Se Mujhe Agaah Kiya Hai
english translation text:
Oh Father, My Mother Has Also Been Teaching Me A Few Lessons
She Has Taught Me About The Etiquettes Of Being Loyal To The Imam

urdu transliteration text:
Pehle Me Maroon Aap Se Wadaa Ye Liya Hai
Bas Iss Liye Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Raha Hoon
english translation text:
She Made Me Promise That I Will Be Martyred Before You
For This Reason, I Am Asking For Your Permission To Become A Martyr

urdu transliteration text: Eik Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Raha Hoon
english translation text: I Am Asking For Permission From A Father To Let His Son Be Martyred!

urdu transliteration text:
Akaa Mujhe Maaloom Hai Kyaa Maang Raha Hoon
Ek Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Raha Hoon
english translation text:
Ali Akbar Addresses His Father: Oh My Master (Father) I Know What I Am Asking For
I Am Asking For The Permission To Be Martyred From A Father!

urdu transliteration text:
Hai Aap To Baba Bin Khaatoon Qayamat
Aur Maa Hai Mri Apna Si K Pehkar Ismat
english translation text:
You, My Father, Are The Son Of The Lady Of The Worlds (Title Of Bibi Fatima SA)
And My Mother Too Is An Embodiment Of Purity

urdu transliteration text:
Kya Sin Mein Us Pai Nahin Kuch Jalbah Ismat
Mai Maader E Muztar Ka Kahaa Maang Rahaa Hoon
english translation text:
Her Heart Has Nothing But Honourable Emotions
I Am Asking For What My Restless Mother Has Asked For.

urdu transliteration text: Eik Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Raha Hoon
english translation text: I Am Asking For Permission From A Father To Let His Son Be Martyred!

urdu transliteration text:
AKAA MUJHE MAALOOM HAI KYAA MAANG RAHA HOON
EK BAAP SE MARNE KI RIZAA MAANG RAHA HOON
english translation text:
Ali Akbar addresses his father: Oh my Master (Father) I know what I am asking for
I am asking for the permission to be martyred from a father!

urdu transliteration text:
Baba Mujhe Ehwale Dile Zor Pata Hai
Ay Sakt Bohot Manzil E Dushar Pata Hai
english translation text:
Oh Father, I Am Aware Of The Condition Of Your Broken Heart
I Recognise That My Killing Will Be Extremely Harsh On You.

urdu transliteration text:
Aur Deen Ka Mushkil Me Hai Sardar Pataa Hai
Yoon Aap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Raha Hoon
english translation text:
I Recognise That The Master Of Our Religion (Imam Hussain AS) Is Facing Tremendous Difficulty
And Now Here I Am, Asking For Your Permission To Become A Martyr

urdu transliteration text: Eik Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Raha Hoon
english translation text: I Am Asking For Permission From A Father To Let His Son Be Martyred!

urdu transliteration text:
Akaa Mujhe Maaloom Hai Kyaa Maang Raha Hoon
Ek Baap Se Marne Ki Rizaa Maang Raha Hoon
english translation text:
Ali Akbar Addresses His Father: Oh My Master (Father) I Know What I Am Asking For
I Am Asking For The Permission To Be Martyred From A Father!
